replenishment_policy.instruction: Add new todo tasks ONLY when the pool falls below minimum_todo_tasks. Before adding, scan existing done and blocked tasks — never recreate implemented features. Prefer stabilization, wiring, and test coverage over new trend modules. Read docs/trends.md for inspiration when replenishment is needed.

autonomous_loop_policy.selection_rule: Choose the first todo task that is not blocked by high/critical risk. If the first todo task is too large, create smaller prerequisite tasks and select the first prerequisite.
autonomous_loop_policy.anti_stall_rule: Never ask the user for the next task while safe low/medium-risk tasks can be generated from architecture docs, failing CI, TODO comments, or repeated errors.
autonomous_loop_policy.failure_rule: If CI fails, prioritize a fix task for the failure before starting new features.

tasks.description: Create a project-level architecture document that maps biological concepts to engineering contracts and defines the Jules self-improvement governance model.

tasks.title: Validate agent task manifest

Sub-agents run in isolated git worktrees.
Tests verify isolated task execution.

tasks.title: Realtime guardrail fallback v4
tasks.description: Inspired by OpenAI Agents SDK trend: Realtime guardrail fallback mechanisms during tool execution. Implement a more robust fallback system.
acceptance: Fallback is triggered on guardrail violation.
System gracefully degrades without crashing.
Tests pass.

tasks.title: Hermes Persistent Memory
tasks.description: Inspired by Hermes Agent trend: Persistent memory: чем дольше работает, тем лучше знает пользователя. Implement a persistent user profile memory.
acceptance: Persistent memory stores user traits over time
Tests verify trait accumulation

tasks.title: OpenClaw Context Engine Lifecycle Hooks
tasks.description: Inspired by OpenClaw trend: Context Engine plugin interface с lifecycle hooks. Implement lifecycle hooks for plugins.
acceptance: Plugins can register lifecycle hooks
Hooks are triggered accurately
Tests verify hook execution

tasks.title: A2A Discovery via Agent Cards
tasks.description: Inspired by trend: A2A (Agent-to-Agent Protocol) Agent discovery через Agent Cards. Implement a discovery service that locates and connects to other agents using standard Agent Cards.
acceptance: Agent can broadcast and receive Agent Cards
Discovered agents are registered in local cache
Tests mock network operations

tasks.title: ACS Guardrails Policy Layer
tasks.description: Inspired by trend: ACS (Agent Control Specification) - 5 validation checkpoints. Implement a comprehensive policy layer implementing the 5 standard ACS checkpoints for tool execution.
acceptance: All 5 ACS checkpoints are validated before tool execution
Violation triggers clear FallbackStrategy
Tests verify each checkpoint

tasks.title: OpenClaw Canvas Live Visualization
tasks.description: Inspired by trend: OpenClaw Canvas для live визуализации. Implement an interface for live visualization of the agent's internal state and working memory.
acceptance: Canvas can render current working memory and state
Canvas state updates dynamically upon agent state changes
Tests verify state representation

tasks.title: Agent Teams Subagent Spawning
tasks.description: Inspired by trend: Agent Teams: multi-agent с git worktree isolation / Subagent spawning. Implement a dedicated service to dynamically spawn, monitor, and clean up task-specific subagents.
acceptance: Spawner can create isolated subagent processes
Spawner cleans up processes upon task completion
Tests verify full lifecycle management

tasks.title: OpenClaw-RL Online Reinforcement Learning
tasks.description: Inspired by trend: OpenClaw-RL: online reinforcement learning из next-state signals (user replies, tool outputs). Implement an online learning loop that updates behavior based on user replies.
acceptance: RL model dynamically updates from next-state signals
Model improvements are verified in tests
Tests pass
